summary: Frontend testing completed for ViewToggle component across all requested pages. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: INVENTORY PAGE:
- ViewToggle component renders on Inventory page (data-testid='view-toggle')
- List button (data-testid='view-list-btn') visible and clickable
- Grid button (data-testid='view-grid-btn') visible and clickable
- Clicking grid button switches to grid/card view layout showing card tiles with images
- Clicking list button switches back to list view showing cards in rows
MARKET PAGE - MY LISTINGS TAB:
- ViewToggle component renders in My Listings tab
- Grid view shows cards with images, prices ($10, $35, etc.), type (BIN/Auction), and time left
- List view shows cards in rows with thumbnails and metadata
MARKET PAGE - MY COLLECTION TAB:
- ViewToggle component renders in My Collection tab
- Grid view shows collection cards with images and category badges (Col/Sale)
- List view shows cards in rows with Market Value buttons
FLIP FINDER - MONITOR TAB (EbayMonitor):
- ViewToggle component renders in Monitor tab listings panel
- Grid view shows eBay listings as card tiles with images, prices, and action buttons (eBay, Fav, Analizar, Borrar)
- List view shows listings in rows
MARKET VALUE POPUP MESSAGES:
- 'Sin ventas raw recientes' displays correctly when no raw results (instead of 'No data')
- 'Sin ventas PSA 10 recientes' displays correctly when no PSA 10 results (instead of 'No data')
MARKET SEARCH TAB MESSAGES:
- 'Sin ventas raw recientes' displays in Raw/Ungraded section when no results
- 'Sin ventas PSA 10 recientes' displays in PSA 10 section when no results
- Search with results (e.g., 'Kobe Bryant') shows proper stats and listings
critical_code_review_comments: ViewToggle component properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
All three pages (Inventory, Market, Flip Finder) correctly integrate ViewToggle
Spanish 'no data' messages ('Sin ventas raw/PSA 10 recientes') implemented correctly
Grid and list views render different layouts as expected
Toggle state is properly maintained within each component
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing eBay listings and inventory
context_for_next_testing_agent: ViewToggle component tested across Inventory, Market (My Listings + My Collection tabs), and Flip Finder (Monitor tab). All toggle buttons work correctly switching between grid and list views. Spanish 'no data' messages implemented in MarketValueCard and SearchTab. The app uses real eBay API data. Previous iterations confirmed backend APIs are working.

features_tested.ViewToggle_Inventory: PASS - Toggle renders and switches views
features_tested.ViewToggle_Market_MyListings: PASS - Toggle renders and switches views
features_tested.ViewToggle_Market_MyCollection: PASS - Toggle renders and switches views
features_tested.ViewToggle_FlipFinder_Monitor: PASS - Toggle renders and switches views (EbayMonitor)
features_tested.NoData_Messages_Spanish: PASS - 'Sin ventas raw recientes' and 'Sin ventas PSA 10 recientes' display correctly
